670.funFact: The capital of Saint Vincent and the Grenadines is Kingstown, a fascinating cultural hub in Caribbean.

704.name: Vietnam
704.funFact: Vietnam is home to Sơn Đoòng Cave, the largest natural cave in the world, which has its own localized weather system.

710.name: South Africa
710.funFact: South Africa is the only country in the world to host three capital cities, each serving a different branch of government.
